content.en:
The human world, Ye Tian's retreat.

At this moment, Ye Tian was in retreat to impact the half-step domain ancestor level, and the taboo rules in his origin were undergoing a subtle evolution.

As the forbidden rules evolve, the soul begins to transform, causing the transformation of the physical body and the power of the taboo.

Once the transformation is successful, Ye Tian will become a half-step domain ancestor.

And this transformation process is very long, it will take at least tens of thousands of years, and if there is a little mistake in the middle, it will lead to the failure of the transformation.

Of course, as long as you comprehend enough of the mysteries of the domain ancestor, you will almost not fail to break through.

Ye Tian calculated and confirmed that he could break through 100% successfully, so he chose to break through.

As time passed, Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger.

Someday close to 10,000 years ago.

Ye Tian's body ushered in a huge transformation, this was from the body of an invincible Dao Ancestor to the body of a half-step domain ancestor.

Moreover, Ye Tian's Mixed Yuan Holy Body has also greatly improved, from the initial entry level to the peak level of the entry, and it is only one step away from the Holy Body Xiaocheng.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao power had also skyrocketed, and he could hold on to the battle for a longer time.

Of course, the biggest change in Ye Tian was the growth of his spirit, and the improvement of his cultivation made his strength undergo a significant transformation.

When he was an invincible Dao Ancestor before, his combat power was comparable to that of a top-notch Ten Thousand Realm half-step domain ancestor, and after exerting the power of the Extreme Dao, his combat power was comparable to that of an ordinary one-step realm half-step domain ancestor.

But now it's different, his regular combat power is already comparable to the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, once he exerts the power of the Extreme Dao, his combat power will soar to the top Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level.

For example, if he encounters the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor again, even if he is still not the opponent of the other party, he will not be beaten, at least he can fight for a while, and he will not be killed by the other party.

Moreover, having just broken through to the half-step domain ancestor level, Ye Tian still had a lot of room for improvement.

"I have a lot of All Things Star Sand on my body, so many Things Star Sand should be enough for my body to evolve into the All Things Realm level, once my physical body steps into the All Things Realm, my strength can grow a lot again!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The realm of all things is a realm, it is the body of the half-step domain ancestor echoing all things, and the degree to which the physical body controls the rules is not directly related to the strength of the physical body.

For example, Ye Tian's physical body strength was stronger than the physical body of the Ten Thousand Realm, but the physical realm actually did not reach the level of the Ten Thousand Realm.

As for the forbidden path of all things, it is necessary to have enough perception and understanding of the forbidden path to control all things with the forbidden rules, and this is directly related to the evolution of the forbidden rules, which can only be achieved by a long period of retreat.

Therefore, it will take a long time for Ye Tian to achieve the transformation of taboo rules into everything.

Therefore, his current goal is to raise the physical body to the level of the realm of all things first.

------------

Ye Tian took out a grain of All Things Star Sand, swallowed it in one gulp, and then began to refine this grain of Everything Star Sand.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Star Sand of All Things spread to Ye Tian's body, and I saw wisps of forbidden rules refining Ye Tian's body, and countless dense lines seemed to appear on his body, which looked very weird.

But this is the way the sand of all things is refined, very rude, but very effective.

The energy contained in a grain of Star Sand was very amazing, so it took Ye Tian a full thousand years to finally refine it.

Then, Ye Tian began to refine the second grain of the Star Sand.

In this way, a grain of Xingchen Sand was refined by Ye Tian, and Ye Tian's physical body became stronger and stronger, and his physical body could vaguely control all things and control the forbidden rules.

Others may be able to advance their physical bodies to the level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm with dozens of grains of Ten Thousand Things Star Sand, but Ye Tian has already refined a full five hundred grains of All Things Star Sand at this moment, and this is the threshold of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian refined more than two hundred grains of All Things Star Sand, almost using up ninety percent of all Things Star Sand.

this day.

Ye Tian's physical body ushered in a metamorphosis, his physical body seemed to be able to breathe, swallowing the power of the taboo rules, and the physical body seemed to have become the master of the taboo rules, arbitrarily controlling the taboo rules, and bursting out with terrifying physical combat power.

At this moment, his physical body had already stepped into the level of the realm of all things.

The physical body stepped into the realm of all things, Ye Tian's strength increased by at least about thirty percent, and the combat power of the half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm increased by three percent, which was already a huge increase.

The physical body has stepped into the realm of all things, and it can continue to improve, but if it has not really stepped into the realm of the half-step domain ancestor realm of the realm of all things, it will be very difficult to continue to improve the physical body of the realm of all things, and there will be a lot of wasted resources.

Therefore, Ye Tian temporarily gave up cultivating the Ten Thousand Things Realm physical body, and instead turned to cultivating the Forbidden Dao, striving to raise the Forbidden Dao to the Ten Thousand Things Realm level as soon as possible.

this day.

Ye Tian was in retreat, and suddenly one of the strongest Dao Ancestors of the Human Race reported a piece of news, saying that the True Martial Palace Master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace had come to look for him.

"The True Martial Palace Master is looking for me, could it be Ouyang Jiu'er's business?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Immediately, Ye Tian left the human realm and met with the True Martial Palace Master outside the human realm.

A void beyond the human realm.

The True Martial Palace Master was wearing a black robe, and this black robe could block the detection of divine sense.

When Ye Tian came out, the True Martial Palace Master took off his black robe and revealed his figure.

"True Martial Palace Master, are you dressed like this, are you afraid of being recognized by others?

Ye Tian asked.

The True Martial Palace Lord said with an urgent face: "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I am here to beg, something has happened to Miss Jiu'er!"

"Something happened to Jiu'er?"

Ye Tian frowned and hurriedly asked, "What happened?"

The Zhenwu Palace Master said: "Jiu'er's whereabouts were discovered by the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord, who is the henchmen of the Vast Sea Ancestor, and now they have learned Jiu'er's whereabouts and are chasing and killing Miss Jiu'er." Currently, the Jiu'er Realm is trapped in a Forbidden Void Realm. Jiu'er was the realm master of the Forbidden Void Realm, so relying on the Forbidden Void Realm, he could temporarily resist the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and them. The Forbidden Void Realm is claimed to be able to resist the attacks of the Domain Ancestor, and it is difficult to be broken, but with the foundation of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, there is naturally a treasure that specializes in breaking the Void Realm, so it is not difficult to break the Forbidden Void Realm! Once the Forbidden Void Realm is forced, Miss Jiu'er will be caught if she does not die, and there will be no chance to get out again!"

"Where is Jiu'er now?"

Ye Tian asked.

Immediately, the True Martial Palace Lord told Ouyang Jiu'er's location.

And Ye Tian tore through the space and went to that place to rescue Ouyang Jiu'er!
